description: Create an OpenToonz scene template for a TV production with a resolution of 1280x720 (HD 720p), a frame rate of 24 fps, and a scene length of 120 frames (frames 1-120). Save the scene to /home/ga/OpenToonz/projects/ep01_sc010/ep01_sc010.tnz and document these specifications in a text file at /home/ga/OpenToonz/projects/ep01_sc010/scene_specs.txt.
